step_b_causal_abel_6step.note: auto_signal_accuracy is the regex+causal signal engine alone; final accuracy includes 6-step deep causal-Abel reading per item

methodology.step_1: Identify macro nodes: inflation, federalFunds, GDP, employment, assetPrices, exchangeRate, fiscal, expectations
methodology.step_2: Construct causal chain: inflation <-> federalFunds <-> GDP (with employment, expectations, assetPrices as supporting)
methodology.step_3: Determine Markov blanket of federalFunds: parents={inflation, GDP_gap, employment}, children={financial_conditions, lending_rates}, co-parents={expectations, fiscal}
methodology.step_4: Classify intervention direction on federalFunds node based on text signals
methodology.step_5: Distinguish mechanism description (neutral) from policy stance (hawkish/dovish)
